config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmTienDoHangTrang3
Nút WinForms gốc: (không)
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: SYS_USER_RULE_Get, TRTB_M_LOCATION_GETBYDEPARTMENT, TRTB_M_LOCATION_NEXT_GETALL, TR_DONDATHANG_GETLISTHTR, TR_PALLET_CARD_GETBYID, TR_PALLET_GETBYID, TR_TINHGIA_NGUYENLIEU, TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_GETBYDONHANG2, TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_GETBYDONHANG3, TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_GETBYDONHANG4, TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_INSERT
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_dexuat_bangmau, tr_dondathang, tr_hehang, tr_khachhang, tr_material, tr_order, tr_order_replacement, tr_pallet_card, tr_phieuyeucau, tr_phieuyeucau_chitiet, tr_phieuyeucau_muahang, tr_phieuyeucau_muahang_chitiet, tr_site, tr_trangthai_sanxuat, trtb_m_location
